TX.logic: In {{city}}, the hail belt is no joke. We recommend Malarkey because their rubberized shingles resist cracking when hit by large hail.

FL.logic: Near {{neighborhood}}, wind uplift is the primary risk. GAF with LayerLock technology is a strong match for coastal {{state}} wind zones.

NC.logic: Shade near {{parks}} can drive algae streaks. CertainTeed’s copper-infused granules help {{city}} roofs stay cleaner longer.

CO.logic: Intense UV near {{landmark}} can accelerate wear. Owens Corning Duration with SureNail helps {{state}} freeze-thaw cycles without blow-offs.
